signals.headline: Wembanyama Concussion Confirmed: Spurs Star Ruled Out After Game 2 Fall vs
signals.raw:
Wembanyama Concussion Confirmed: Spurs Star Ruled Out After Game 2 Fall vs. Trail Blazers | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Victor Wembanyama, San Antonio Spurs' MVP finalist and rookie standout from his postseason debut, suffered a concussion in Game 2 and was ruled out, impacting Western Conference semifinals odds as Spurs (2nd seed, 62-20) face Portland.[3][4]

signals.headline: Lakers Lead Rockets 2-0 in West Semis Game 2 Win; OKC Up 1-0 on Suns | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Lakers Lead Rockets 2-0 in West Semis Game 2 Win; OKC Up 1-0 on Suns | YES | MED confidence**  
Los Angeles Lakers (3rd/4th West) confirmed 2-0 series lead over Houston Rockets heading to Game 3 (Apr 24); OKC Thunder (1st, 64-18) leads Phoenix Suns 1-0 after Game 2 (Apr 22, 6:30 PM), moving OKC series win probabilities.[1]

signals.raw:
Knicks Collapse in Game 2: Blow 12-Point 4th-Quarter Lead vs. Pacers | YES | HIGH confidence**  
New York Knicks (3rd East, 53-29) lost after coach Mike Brown's puzzling decisions in a collapse, with Pacers (4th) now up 2-1 in Eastern semis; shifts series prediction markets heavily.[1][3][4]
